2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? Yes: The text describes content of 1st section (theory) and 2nd section (practical). It gives details. So yes.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It gives sections and subpoints, also timeline table. So yes.

Thus all three comply.

But maybe note the table at the end (Bakalaura darba izstrādes plāns) but maybe it's not part of chapters. The text overall is clear.
